common.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete

dashboard.title: Control Plane
dashboard.subtitle: Protocol-agnostic identity routing at a glance

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.subtitle: Manage isolation zones for multi-tenant deployments
tenants.create_desc: Create a new isolation zone for your deployment
tenants.name_hint: Lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens only (e.g., acme-corp)
tenants.login_methods_desc: Configure which authentication methods are available for users in this tenant.
tenants.password_login_desc: Standard login with username/email and password
tenants.no_oidc_providers: No OIDC providers configured for this tenant.
tenants.no_saml_providers: No SAML providers configured for this tenant.
tenants.about_desc: Tenants provide isolation zones for different organizations or environments. Each tenant can have its own set of clients, connections, and configurations. The default tenant is always present and cannot be deleted.
tenants.delete_warning: Deleting this tenant will permanently remove all associated:
tenants.delete_assoc_data: All related session and login data

oidc_clients.title: OIDC Clients
oidc_clients.subtitle: OAuth2/OpenID Connect applications consuming identity from Shyntr
oidc_clients.empty_desc: Create your first OIDC client to start authenticating users via OAuth2/OpenID Connect.
oidc_clients.create_desc: Configure a new OAuth2/OIDC client for your application
oidc_clients.leave_empty: Leave empty to auto-generate a secure secret
oidc_clients.public_client_desc: For SPAs and mobile apps (no secret)

oidc_connections.title: OIDC Providers
oidc_connections.subtitle: External OpenID Connect providers for social & modern SSO
oidc_connections.empty_desc: Connect external identity providers like Google, Microsoft, or Auth0 to enable social login.
oidc_connections.add_desc: Connect an external identity provider using OpenID Connect
oidc_connections.mapping_desc: Map external OIDC claims to standard internal claims
oidc_connections.delete_desc: Users will no longer be able to sign in using this provider.

saml_clients.title: SAML Clients
saml_clients.subtitle: Service Providers (SPs) receiving SAML assertions from Shyntr
saml_clients.empty_desc: Create your first SAML Service Provider to enable enterprise SSO integration.
saml_clients.edit_desc: Update your SAML Service Provider configuration
saml_clients.create_desc: Configure a new SAML Service Provider
saml_clients.acs_desc: Where Shyntr sends the SAML assertion
saml_clients.sp_metadata_desc: Provide a Metadata URL to auto-fill SP details. If provided, fields below are optional.
saml_clients.mapping_desc: Map SAML assertion attributes to standard claims

saml_connections.title: SAML Providers
saml_connections.subtitle: Enterprise Identity Providers (IdPs) for SAML-based SSO
saml_connections.empty_desc: Connect your enterprise Identity Provider (Okta, Azure AD, etc.) to enable SAML-based SSO.
saml_connections.edit_desc: Update your SAML Identity Provider configuration
saml_connections.add_desc: Configure a SAML connection to your enterprise IdP
saml_connections.idp_metadata_desc: Easiest method. Provide the URL to auto-configure the connection.
saml_connections.manual_config_desc: Fill these if you do not have a Metadata URL or XML.
saml_connections.xml_desc: Fallback: Paste the raw SAML metadata XML if you don't have a URL and don't want to use manual fields.
saml_connections.sign_request_desc: Sign the AuthnRequest sent to IdP
saml_connections.mapping_desc: Map IdP SAML attributes to OIDC standard claims
saml_connections.delete_desc: Users will no longer be able to sign in using this Identity Provider.

scopes.title: Identity Scopes
scopes.subtitle: Manage OAuth2 scopes and Attribute Release boundaries.
scopes.empty_desc: Create identity scopes to control which claims are shared with applications.
scopes.edit_desc: Update the scope description and its associated claims.
scopes.create_desc: Define a new scope and the identity claims it will release.
scopes.claims_hint: Claims listed here will be released to the client when this scope is requested.
scopes.delete_desc: Applications requesting this scope will no longer receive its associated claims.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage appearance and access global identity metadata endpoints (Default Tenant).
settings.theme_desc: Change the dashboard look and feel
settings.oidc_desc: OpenID Connect configuration endpoint for the default tenant.
settings.saml_idp_desc: Identity Provider metadata XML for Shyntr acting as an IdP.
settings.saml_sp_desc: Service Provider metadata XML for Shyntr acting as an SP.
